principle: Show autocomplete suggestions immediately as the user types to reduce effort and guide toward existing content
explanation: X.ux|search_autocomplete: user_types -> suggestions_appear_instantly NOT after_pause; reduces_typing_effort + typo_errors + guides_to_valid_content; suggestions: ranked_by_relevance + highlight_matched_chars; NO:suggestions_only_after_3+_chars NO:suggestions_with_noticeable_delay eg: "user_types_'UI_d'_no_feedback" >> "user_types_'UI_d' -> 'UI design for beginners' + 'UI design handbook'"

principle: Never show a dead-end no-results page — always offer related terms, popular searches, or partial matches
explanation: X.ux|no_results_page: "no_results_found" alone -> dead_end -> user_leaves; fix: show_related_search_terms + popular_searches + partial_matches ("See_21_results_for_'design'"); keep_user_engaged + guide_toward_content; NO:empty_page_with_only_error_message NO:no_results_without_alternatives eg: "Sorry, no matches found." >> "No matches for 'Advanced design users' — See 21 related results for 'design'"
